The '''Vaxal system''' was a five-orbit [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] Territories, home to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ord Vaxal]]. It was in [[Callia sector/Legends|Callia sector]] which was controlled by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Adria Reyn]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The Vaxal system was relatively close to [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].

{{System-stub}}
